decisions.summary: Target proper 3D SIA avatar; 2D reactive fallback only if 3D infeasible for V1. Do not lead production with AI-generated avatar assets unless the quality/reference direction is strong enough to build premium trust.
Finish CP-01 carousel flow, SIA onboarding canvas, and controlled domain visual language before leading with SIA avatar, media/trust, or Knowledge Graph production.
Encrypted, private by default, no V1 share; premium opt-in AI analysis; secure thumbnail and provenance states.
No PDF/data export V1; in-app preview and reviewed summaries only.
Demo recommendations and no-live-sync placeholders; no implied real playback/sync.
Honest preview/demo visual only; not full browsable guest shell.
Friends/private-first; avoid global ranking and public-room default creatives.
Guided insight-map with explainable paths; not dense force-graph hero.
Earned, near-next, progress, and quiet hidden/locked badge variants.

Best asset wins by surface: real/licensed/owned or non-identifiable demo fixtures for sensitive people/body/trust; generated or licensed allowed for food, posters, abstract, empty/system, gamification, and demo content when credible and QA-passed.
